reviews.comment:
Por si necesitas estacionar hay garage al lado estacion YPF subis y la hora esta aprox 100 pesos siempre es bueno tener un garage cerca .

(Translated by Google)
If you need to park, there's a garage next to the YPF station; you go up and the hourly rate is approximately 100 pesos. It's always good to have a garage nearby.
